Assembly District 22, Brooklyn; ED 24-2721 (Tract 1126-part); Sheet 7B Line 64; T627. Max (Head, 47, Rumania, Married, same residence since 1935), Jennie (Wife, 44, Rumania, Married, same since 1935), Ida (Daughter, 20, NY), Rhoda (Daughter, 14, NY). Anna absent — would be ~23, likely married/moved out.
Husband Max Flaxman died 4 Mar 1941, Brooklyn, Kings County, NY. Age 47. Death cert# 5278. Parents: Abraham Flaxman (Russia), Anna (Russia).

Filed petition N-400 as widow of naturalized citizen (Nationality Act 1940, Sec.312). Address: 321 Georgia Ave, Brooklyn. Born 13 Mar 1896 Bessarabia. Arrived 8 Jul 1913 SS Zeeland as Scheindel Kaufman. Married Max 1 Jun 1917. Max naturalized 10 Jun 1926 Brooklyn cert#2349831. Petition cert# 395553.
Naturalized 17 Aug 1944, Brooklyn (U.S. District Court, Eastern District of NY). Certificate# 5971171.

surname_puzzle_resolution.question: Was 'Dickstein' a prior-marriage name, stepfather name, or tree error?
surname_puzzle_resolution.answer: TREE DATA-ENTRY ERROR. Three independent primary sources confirm maiden name = KAUFMAN only:

evidence.finding: Reads 'Jennie Flaxman formerly Jennie KAUFMAN' — no Dickstein
Arrived as 'Scheindel KAUFMAN', marital status SINGLE
Bride: 'Jennie KAUFMAN', marital status SINGLE — definitively no prior marriage to any Dickstein

research_notes.text:
{geni:about_me} Arrived in the U.S. around 1913.
--------------------
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bessarabia

FamilySearch research session 2026-05-25: Surname puzzle RESOLVED — 'Dickstein' is a tree data-entry error (no supporting record found; three primary sources confirm maiden name KAUFMAN and SINGLE status before first marriage). Key records retrieved: naturalization petition N-400 (1934), SS Zeeland manifest (8 Jul 1913), NYC marriage cert (1 Jun 1917), 1920/1930/1940 US censuses, Max's death cert (4 Mar 1941), Jennie's naturalization certificate (17 Aug 1944, cert# 5971171). Two previously unknown children found: Anna (b.1917) and Rhoda (1926-1989). Multiple GEDCOM facts corrected: birth year (1895→1896), birth place (Chișinău→Bessarabia/Chotin), death place (Brooklyn→Staten Island), marriage place (Manhattan→Brooklyn). FamilySearch tree PID: LBGQ-RWV.
